name: healthcare_heat_dome_stresses_southport_auto_ben
premise: Infection control wants a ward closed; bed management is refusing without a signed surge plan from the county. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare heat dome stresses southport auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both autonomy and beneficence; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Keisha Serrano
agents.identity: I am Keisha Serrano, the accountable executive on this bridge in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Elena Sato
agents.identity: I am Elena Sato, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on beneficence.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on beneficence for immediate traction on autonomy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Keisha Serrano must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Keisha Serrano do?
